title: Bee Removal in Fordham, Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Fordham, Bronx. Safe, humane bee hive removal from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for fast service!
intro: Dealing with a bee problem in Fordham? Best Pest Control NYC offers safe, professional bee removal services throughout the Fordham neighborhood. Our experienced technicians provide humane bee hive relocation and complete removal for residential and commercial properties, with pricing ranging from $350 to $550 depending on hive location and complexity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Fordham residents and businesses for years with licensed, insured technicians who prioritize safe, humane bee removal methods. We offer same-day or next-day service, transparent pricing, and guarantee our work to ensure your property remains bee-free.
localContext: Fordham's mix of historic homes near Fordham University, apartment buildings along Fordham Road, and residential streets creates various opportunities for bees to nest in eaves, walls, and trees. Our team is familiar with the architectural styles throughout Fordham, from pre-war buildings near the Bronx Zoo to newer construction, and we adapt our removal techniques accordingly.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Fordham?
faqs.answer: Bee removal in Fordham typically costs between $350 and $550. The final price depends on factors such as the hive's location (wall void, attic, tree, etc.), size of the colony, accessibility, and height requirements. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Fordham property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day bee removal service in Fordham for most situations. After you contact us, we'll schedule an inspection as soon as possible, and in many cases, we can complete the removal during that same visit, especially for exterior hives or swarms.

faqs.question: Do you kill the bees or relocate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we use humane relocation methods to preserve bee populations, which are essential pollinators. We work with local beekeepers to relocate hives safely. However, in cases where the colony is inside walls or poses immediate danger, removal methods may vary, and we'll discuss all options with you beforehand.

faqs.question: Will bees return after removal in Fordham?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes sealing entry points and treating the area to prevent re-infestation. We remove all honeycomb and pheromone traces that might attract new swarms. We guarantee our work and will return if bees attempt to re-establish in the same location within our warranty period.
